app_description: Flora AI helps you identify plant diseases using artificial intelligence. Just take a photo of your plant and get an instant diagnosis and treatment.
tap_to_change_photo: Tap the photo to change it
clear_scans_confirm: You have {count} scans. Do you want to clear them all?
confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
welcome_title_1: Identify any plant with one photo
welcome_desc_1: Take a photo of any plant and get comprehensive information instantly
welcome_title_2: Diagnose your plant problems and get instant treatment
welcome_desc_2: AI expert available 24/7 to help solve your plant problems
welcome_title_3: Never forget to water your plants again
welcome_desc_3: Smart reminders customized for each plant based on its needs
disease_healthy:
✅ Plant is Healthy
No signs of disease, your plant is doing great!
disease_fungi:
Fungal Disease
The plant is infected with a fungal disease appearing as white, gray, or black spots.
disease_bacteria:
Bacterial Disease
The plant is infected with bacteria appearing as dark spots or rotting areas.
disease_virus:
Viral Disease
The plant is infected with a virus appearing as leaf deformity or color changes.
disease_pests:
Pest Infestation
The plant is infested with insects or pests feeding on its leaves.
treatment_healthy:
• Continue regular watering
• Ensure periodic fertilization
• Maintain good ventilation
• Monitor the plant regularly
treatment_fungi:
• Spray appropriate fungicide every 5-7 days
• Reduce humidity around the plant
• Remove infected leaves
• Avoid spraying water on leaves
• Improve ventilation
treatment_bacteria:
• Remove infected parts immediately
• Spray copper-based bactericide every 7 days
• Avoid overwatering
• Improve ventilation around the plant
• Sterilize tools before and after use
treatment_virus:
• No direct treatment for viruses
• Remove infected plant to prevent spread
• Eliminate insects that carry the virus
• Sterilize soil and tools
• Replace with a healthy plant
treatment_pests:
• Spray appropriate insecticide
• Use insecticidal soap as a natural alternative
• Remove insects manually if possible
• Isolate plant from others
• Repeat spraying every 5 days
no_treatment_available: No treatment plan available for this plant
garden_select_hint: Choose the plant to add the analysis result to
